CustomField.description: Fully qualified class name of the risk assessor to use (must implement UoWInterfaces.IRiskAssessor). If blank, risk assessment is skipped.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fully qualified class name of the risk assessor to use (must implement UoWInterfaces.IRiskAssessor). If blank, risk assessment is skipped.
CustomField.label: Risk Assessor Class Name
